# Prerelease Gate — 2026-07-08

## Summary
- Repo: danieljustus/symaira-memory
- HEAD: ba92d22218ef035c94600c445bb25402eb957ac9 (feat(cli,mcp): expose grounded evidence via get/search/MCP, #324)
- Last release: v0.10.0
- Proposed target: v0.11.0 (bump: minor)
- Gate: pass

Bump rationale: three merged `feat` PRs since v0.10.0 (#322 memory_evidence schema + persistence, #323 consolidation evidence propagation, #324 CLI/MCP evidence exposure) add new, backward-compatible functionality — no breaking changes to existing CLI flags, MCP tool default payloads, or DB schema (additive table + additive struct field). Under SemVer `0.y.z`, new features are a minor bump.

| Coverage vs threshold | PASS | No hard coverage gate in CI; all touched/added packages (`internal/db` 72.2%, `internal/extractor` 85.8%, `internal/consolidation` 82.4%, `internal/mcp` 65.1%, `cmd` 44.9%) in line with pre-existing repo-wide levels, no regression signal |
| Coverage regression | PASS | Full suite green before and after each merge in this session; no baseline drop observed |
| Patch coverage | PASS | New code (`internal/db/evidence.go`, extractor grounding, consolidation propagation, CLI/MCP evidence exposure) each carry dedicated new tests, verified individually during implementation |
| Assets preview | PASS | none expected — Go CLI/MCP tool, no goreleaser/release workflow in this repo; consumed via `go install`/source build |
| Security | PASS (partial) | CI "Vulnerability Scan" job green on HEAD; Dependabot alerts API returns 403 "disabled for this repository" (repo setting, not verifiable via `gh api`) — no blocking evidence of open alerts |
